claims.claim: Late-2025 planning data reports YouTube 7.01M ad reach, Facebook 5.05M ad reach, Instagram 5.00M ad reach, TikTok 4.49M adults 18+ ad reach, and LinkedIn 3.10M registered members in Israel.
claims.caveat: Figures use different methodologies and do not represent comparable active-user counts.

claims.claim: Current YouTube rules categorize square or vertical uploads up to three minutes as Shorts; #Shorts is not required.
TikTok requires labels for realistic AI-generated content, encourages broader disclosure, may auto-label Content Credentials, and says compliant labeling does not affect distribution.
Meta requires disclosure for photorealistic generated video or realistic-sounding generated audio and may detect standard AI metadata for labeling.
claims.caveat: Re-check current Help Center before publishing because policy and labels evolve.

rejected_claims: Universal best posting times for Israel
A universal 15 percent Instagram caption-link reach penalty
